name: arch3-diagram
description: Reference tooling and editor for the Arch3 diagramming methodology.

scripts.build:packages: npm run build -w @arch3/arch3-model && npm run build -w @arch3/arch3-dsl && npm run build -w @arch3/arch3-plantuml
scripts.typecheck: npm run build:packages && npm run typecheck -w @arch3/arch3-model && npm run typecheck -w @arch3/arch3-dsl && npm run typecheck -w @arch3/arch3-plantuml && npm run typecheck -w @arch3/editor-web && npm run typecheck -w @arch3/docs
scripts.build: npm run build:packages && npm run build -w @arch3/editor-web && npm run build -w @arch3/docs
scripts.test: npm run test -w @arch3/arch3-model && npm run test -w @arch3/arch3-dsl && npm run test -w @arch3/arch3-plantuml && npm run test -w @arch3/editor-web && npm run test -w @arch3/docs
scripts.dev:editor: npm run build:packages && npm run start -w @arch3/editor-web
